_comment: Settings que NÃO são rulesets — security level, bot management, TLS. Aplicar via PATCH /zones/{zone_id}/settings/{name}

security_level._comment: off|essentially_off|low|medium|high|under_attack. Eleva para 'high' em incidente via tool waf_set_security_level

ssl._comment: Full (Strict) — exige cert válido na origem
